2026-04-09T21:41:36.9094626Z 
2026-04-09T21:41:36.9098112Z **Documentation gap analysis complete.** Here's what was found:
2026-04-09T21:41:36.9098435Z 
2026-04-09T21:41:41.1983616Z The push (commit `35066712b`, PR #58032, by @jsquire) introduced two new experimental classes — `DocumentIntelligenceClientSettings` and `DocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClientSettings` — along with DI extension methods (`AddDocumentIntelligenceClient`, `AddDocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClient`) to `Azure.AI.DocumentIntelligence`. These are listed in CHANGELOG under `1.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` but are **completely absent from the README**.
2026-04-09T21:41:41.1986876Z 
2026-04-09T21:41:41.1987465Z Since the `create_issue` tool is not available as a callable function in this environment, I'm signaling via the text format:

2026-04-09T21:41:46.4031958Z   ## Documentation Gap
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4032248Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4032547Z   **Package:** `Azure.AI.DocumentIntelligence`
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4033146Z   **Service directory:** `sdk/documentintelligence/Azure.AI.DocumentIntelligence/`
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4033781Z   **Triggered by:** 35066712b (PR #58032) by @jsquire
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4034160Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4034386Z   ## What Changed
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4034647Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4037615Z   PR #58032 added two new `[Experimental]` settings classes — `DocumentIntelligenceClientSettings` and `DocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClientSettings` — along with constructor overloads and `AddDocumentIntelligenceClient` / `AddDocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClient` extension methods for Microsoft.Extensions.Azure dependency injection. These are tracked under CHANGELOG entry `1.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)`.
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4040435Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4040694Z   ## Gaps Found
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4040976Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4042682Z   - The README has no section explaining how to create a `DocumentIntelligenceClient` or `DocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClient` from an `IConfiguration`/`IConfigurationSection` using `DocumentIntelligenceClientSettings` / `DocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClientSettings`
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4045958Z   - No documentation or sample covering dependency injection registration via `AddDocumentIntelligenceClient` and `AddDocumentIntelligenceAdministrationClient` extension methods (from `DocumentIntelligenceClientBuilderExtensions`)
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4047900Z   - No test-backed sample file exists for the new Settings/DI workflow (the `tests/Samples/` directory has no coverage for these scenarios)
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4048965Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4049224Z   <details>
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4049770Z   <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4050242Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4050871Z   This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4051591Z   
2026-04-09T21:41:46.4051860Z   ### Step 1: Modify files
